channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-05-21
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ESMA publishes shortlist of candidates for position of Chair 20/05/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets reg
item.description: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets reg — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (esma news) ; impact marché.

item.title: Results of the March 2026 survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing and OTC derivatives markets (SESFOD)
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (ecb - press / speeches / interviews) ; impact marché.

item.title: Basel Committee agrees to publish report on information and communication technology risk management, progresses cryptoasset targeted review, considers targeted updates on liquidity risk principles
item.description: Agrees to publish range of practices report on information and communication technology risk management. Progresses its targeted review of the prudential standard for banks' cryptoasset exposures. Considers targeted updates of its principles on liquidity risk. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (bis - press releases) ; impact marché.
